A hostile/forged envelope: securityHits stripped to [] and class relabeled benign_inplace, on the SAME ingress[0].cidr_blocks change watchlisted-sg.json carries honestly. Post-W1 this path is shape-expressible ([s,0,s], index 0), so ClassifyByFields (which trusts only the envelope's own fields) would classify this BucketAdopt — the fourth screen is what still catches it, from the CHECKOUT's own watchlist, independent of anything this envelope claims.
